topic: A hatch appears overnight in a hallway ceiling, opening onto an attic far larger than the house below.
title: The Hatch That Wasn't There Yesterday | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There was a hatch in my hallway ceiling that had never existed before.
scenes.image_prompt: a narrow dim hallway, a square wooden hatch set into the ceiling, faint outline, low light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have lived in this small two bedroom house for nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: exterior of a modest single story suburban house at dusk, fog along the lawn, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I knew every ceiling in it.
scenes.image_prompt: interior ceiling corners, flat white paint, plain light fixture, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dragged the ladder over and pushed the hatch open into the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: an aluminum step ladder under an open ceiling hatch, darkness above, dim hallway light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My flashlight beam never found a wall.
scenes.image_prompt: a flashlight beam disappearing into vast black empty attic space, dust motes, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The attic stretched the length of a warehouse, far past where my walls should end.
scenes.image_prompt: an enormous empty attic space with distant wooden rafters fading into darkness, single beam of light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I paced my house outside. Forty feet, end to end.
scenes.image_prompt: a person silhouette pacing along the exterior wall of a house at night, measuring tape, dim porch light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The attic inside measured over two hundred.
scenes.image_prompt: a long tape measure stretched across dusty attic floorboards vanishing into shadow, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Footprints crossed the dust up there, leading away from the hatch into nothing.
scenes.image_prompt: trail of footprints in thick gray dust on attic boards leading into darkness, single light source, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The prints came back, and they stopped directly above my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: an attic floor section directly above a faint ceiling outline of a bedroom below, footprints ending, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I nailed the hatch shut. By morning the nails were on the floor.
scenes.image_prompt: bent nails scattered on hallway floorboards beneath a ceiling hatch, dim morning light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have never had an attic. The hatch only opens from the other side now.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed ceiling hatch from below, faint pressure bulging the wood downward, low light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
